name: subheading
label: Subheading
default: Driving towards autonomous systems that improve, scale, and compound value over time.

children.name: description
children.label: Description (shows when expanded)
children.default: Short stage description shown on expand.

children.name: background_image
children.label: Card background image
children.help_text: Optional. When set, replaces the default gradient art for this card. Use ~508×680px or larger; image is cropped to cover the card.

default.title: Integrated Systems
default.description: Replace fragmented, siloed services with unified systems that run business operations.

default.title: System-Led Execution
default.description: Move from human-dependent delivery models to intelligent systems that execute independently.

default.title: Compounding Outcomes
default.description: Shift from linear, effort-based results to software-driven value that compounds over time.

default.title: Autonomous Orchestration
default.description: Reduce manual coordination by activating agents that orchestrate complex, real-time enterprise workflows.

name: footer_text
label: Closing paragraph
default: Execution systems unify decisions, workflows, data, and agents into a continuous system, where intelligence drives decisions, systems execute work, and execution continuously improves itself.
